---
title: "data-cleansing"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)
```

```{r libraries}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
```

```{r config}
season_cols <- c("winter", "spring", "summer", "autumn", "annual")
required_cols <- c("year", season_cols)

raw_files <- tibble::tribble(
  ~metric, ~path,
  "mean", "raw/mean/cet_v2-1-0-0_meantemp-seasonal-totals.csv",
  "min",  "raw/min/cet_v2-1-0-0_mintemp-seasonal-totals.csv",
  "max",  "raw/max/cet_v2-1-0-0_maxtemp-seasonal-totals.csv"
)

dir.create("processed", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create("processed/features", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create("processed/qa", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

```{r helper-functions}
read_hadcet_totals <- function(path, metric) {
  raw_tbl <- read_csv(
    path,
    skip = 38,
    na = c("NA", ""),
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
  ) %>%
    slice(-n())

  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(raw_tbl))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Missing required columns in ", path, ": ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  cleaned_tbl <- raw_tbl %>%
    select(all_of(required_cols)) %>%
    mutate(
      year = parse_integer(year),
      across(all_of(season_cols), parse_double)
    ) %>%
    arrange(year)

  list(
    data = cleaned_tbl
  )
}

augment_wide_features <- function(df, metric) {
  first_year <- min(df$year, na.rm = TRUE)

  df %>%
    mutate(
      metric = metric,
      in_common_window = dplyr::between(year, 1879L, 2024L),
      baseline_period = case_when(
        dplyr::between(year, 1961L, 1990L) ~ "1961_1990",
        dplyr::between(year, 1991L, 2020L) ~ "1991_2020",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      complete_record = if_all(all_of(season_cols), ~ !is.na(.x)),
      structural_first_winter_missing = year == first_year & is.na(winter)
    )
}

make_long_features <- function(df, metric) {
  first_year <- min(df$year, na.rm = TRUE)

  df %>%
    mutate(metric = metric) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = all_of(season_cols),
      names_to = "season",
      values_to = "temperature_c"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      season = factor(season, levels = season_cols),
      in_common_window = dplyr::between(year, 1879L, 2024L),
      baseline_period = case_when(
        dplyr::between(year, 1961L, 1990L) ~ "1961_1990",
        dplyr::between(year, 1991L, 2020L) ~ "1991_2020",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      missing_type = case_when(
        is.na(temperature_c) & season == "winter" & year == first_year ~ "structural_first_winter",
        is.na(temperature_c) ~ "other_missing",
        TRUE ~ "observed"
      )
    )
}

summarise_quality <- function(df, metric, path) {
  duplicate_years <- df %>%
    count(year, name = "n_records") %>%
    filter(n_records > 1)

  year_gaps <- if (nrow(df) > 1) sum(diff(df$year) != 1L, na.rm = TRUE) else 0L
  first_year <- min(df$year, na.rm = TRUE)
  total_missing <- sum(is.na(df[season_cols]))
  structural_missing_count <- sum(df$year == first_year & is.na(df$winter))

  tibble(
    metric = metric,
    source_file = path,
    import_rule = "read_csv(skip = 38) then slice(-n())",
    joins_or_merges = "none",
    rows = nrow(df),
    start_year = min(df$year, na.rm = TRUE),
    end_year = max(df$year, na.rm = TRUE),
    duplicate_year_count = nrow(duplicate_years),
    non_consecutive_year_gap_count = year_gaps,
    invalid_year_count = sum(is.na(df$year)),
    total_missing_values = total_missing,
    structural_missing_values = structural_missing_count,
    non_structural_missing_values = total_missing - structural_missing_count
  )
}

summarise_missingness <- function(df, metric) {
  first_year <- min(df$year, na.rm = TRUE)

  df %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(season_cols), names_to = "season", values_to = "temperature_c") %>%
    group_by(season) %>%
    summarise(
      metric = metric,
      missing_count = sum(is.na(temperature_c)),
      structural_missing_count = sum(is.na(temperature_c) & season == "winter" & year == first_year),
      non_structural_missing_count = missing_count - structural_missing_count,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    relocate(metric)
}

flag_outliers <- function(long_tbl) {
  long_tbl %>%
    group_by(metric, season) %>%
    mutate(
      series_median = median(temperature_c, na.rm = TRUE),
      series_mad = mad(temperature_c, center = median(temperature_c, na.rm = TRUE), constant = 1.4826, na.rm = TRUE),
      q1 = quantile(temperature_c, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE),
      q3 = quantile(temperature_c, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE),
      series_iqr = IQR(temperature_c, na.rm = TRUE),
      robust_z = if_else(
        is.na(temperature_c) | is.na(series_mad) | series_mad == 0,
        NA_real_,
        (temperature_c - series_median) / series_mad
      ),
      iqr_lower = q1 - 1.5 * series_iqr,
      iqr_upper = q3 + 1.5 * series_iqr,
      flag_outlier_mad = !is.na(robust_z) & abs(robust_z) > 3.5,
      flag_outlier_iqr = !is.na(temperature_c) & !is.na(series_iqr) & series_iqr > 0 &
        (temperature_c < iqr_lower | temperature_c > iqr_upper),
      flag_outlier_any = flag_outlier_mad | flag_outlier_iqr
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
}
```

```{r import-clean-validate}
datasets <- pmap(
  list(raw_files$path, raw_files$metric),
  read_hadcet_totals
)
names(datasets) <- raw_files$metric

clean_wide <- imap(datasets, ~ augment_wide_features(.x$data, .y))
clean_long <- imap_dfr(datasets, ~ make_long_features(.x$data, .y))

quality_summary <- imap_dfr(
  datasets,
  ~ summarise_quality(.x$data, .y, raw_files$path[raw_files$metric == .y])
)

missingness_summary <- imap_dfr(
  datasets,
  ~ summarise_missingness(.x$data, .y)
)
```

```{r inspection}
quality_summary
missingness_summary
```

```{r outlier-flagging}
outlier_flags <- flag_outliers(clean_long)

outlier_summary <- outlier_flags %>%
  group_by(metric, season) %>%
  summarise(
    n_flagged_mad = sum(flag_outlier_mad, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_flagged_iqr = sum(flag_outlier_iqr, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_flagged_any = sum(flag_outlier_any, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

outlier_review <- outlier_flags %>%
  filter(flag_outlier_any) %>%
  select(
    metric, year, season, temperature_c, baseline_period, in_common_window,
    robust_z, iqr_lower, iqr_upper, flag_outlier_mad, flag_outlier_iqr
  ) %>%
  arrange(metric, season, year)
```

```{r inspection-outliers}
outlier_summary
outlier_review
```

```{r export}
write_csv(select(clean_wide$mean, all_of(required_cols)), "processed/data_mean_cleaned.csv")
write_csv(select(clean_wide$min, all_of(required_cols)), "processed/data_min_cleaned.csv")
write_csv(select(clean_wide$max, all_of(required_cols)), "processed/data_max_cleaned.csv")

write_csv(bind_rows(clean_wide), "processed/features/hadcet_wide_with_flags.csv")
write_csv(clean_long, "processed/features/hadcet_long_with_flags.csv")

write_csv(quality_summary, "processed/qa/quality_summary.csv")
write_csv(missingness_summary, "processed/qa/missingness_summary.csv")
write_csv(outlier_summary, "processed/qa/outlier_summary.csv")
write_csv(outlier_review, "processed/qa/outlier_review.csv")
```
